charlatan 0.6.0
    • Get started
    • Reference
    • Articles
      Contributing to charlatan Creating realistic data
    • Changelog

    Create dates and times

    Source: R/date_time.R
    date_time.Rd

    Create dates and times

    Usage

    ch_timezone(n = 1)

ch_unix_time(n = 1)

ch_date_time(n = 1)

    Arguments

    n

    (integer) number of things to get, any non-negative integer

    See also

    DateTimeProvider

    Examples

    ch_timezone()
#> [[1]]
#> [[1]][[1]]
#> [1] "America/La_Paz"
#> 
#> [[1]]$code
#> [1] "BO"
#> 
#> [[1]]$continent
#> [1] "South America"
#> 
#> [[1]]$name
#> [1] "Bolivia"
#> 
#> [[1]]$capital
#> [1] "Sucre"
#> 
#> 
ch_timezone(10)
#> [[1]]
#> [[1]][[1]]
#> [1] "Africa/Conakry"
#> 
#> [[1]]$code
#> [1] "GN"
#> 
#> [[1]]$continent
#> [1] "Africa"
#> 
#> [[1]]$name
#> [1] "Guinea"
#> 
#> [[1]]$capital
#> [1] "Conakry"
#> 
#> 
#> [[2]]
#> [[2]][[1]]
#> [1] "America/Guatemala"
#> 
#> [[2]]$code
#> [1] "GT"
#> 
#> [[2]]$continent
#> [1] "North America"
#> 
#> [[2]]$name
#> [1] "Guatemala"
#> 
#> [[2]]$capital
#> [1] "Guatemala City"
#> 
#> 
#> [[3]]
#> [[3]][[1]]
#> [1] "Indian/Mauritius"
#> 
#> [[3]]$code
#> [1] "MU"
#> 
#> [[3]]$continent
#> [1] "Africa"
#> 
#> [[3]]$name
#> [1] "Mauritius"
#> 
#> [[3]]$capital
#> [1] "Port Louis"
#> 
#> 
#> [[4]]
#> [[4]][[1]]
#> [1] "Africa/Dakar"
#> 
#> [[4]]$code
#> [1] "SN"
#> 
#> [[4]]$continent
#> [1] "Africa"
#> 
#> [[4]]$name
#> [1] "Senegal"
#> 
#> [[4]]$capital
#> [1] "Dakar"
#> 
#> 
#> [[5]]
#> [[5]][[1]]
#> [1] "Pacific/Tarawa"     "Pacific/Enderbury"  "Pacific/Kiritimati"
#> 
#> [[5]]$code
#> [1] "KI"
#> 
#> [[5]]$continent
#> [1] "Oceania"
#> 
#> [[5]]$name
#> [1] "Kiribati"
#> 
#> [[5]]$capital
#> [1] "Tarawa"
#> 
#> 
#> [[6]]
#> [[6]][[1]]
#> [1] "Africa/Kinshasa"   "Africa/Lubumbashi"
#> 
#> [[6]]$code
#> [1] "CD"
#> 
#> [[6]]$continent
#> [1] "Africa"
#> 
#> [[6]]$name
#> [1] "Democratic Republic of the Congo"
#> 
#> [[6]]$capital
#> [1] "Kinshasa"
#> 
#> 
#> [[7]]
#> [[7]][[1]]
#> [1] "Pacific/Apia"
#> 
#> [[7]]$code
#> [1] "WS"
#> 
#> [[7]]$continent
#> [1] "Oceania"
#> 
#> [[7]]$name
#> [1] "Samoa"
#> 
#> [[7]]$capital
#> [1] "Apia"
#> 
#> 
#> [[8]]
#> [[8]][[1]]
#> [1] "America/Dominica"
#> 
#> [[8]]$code
#> [1] "DM"
#> 
#> [[8]]$continent
#> [1] "North America"
#> 
#> [[8]]$name
#> [1] "Dominica"
#> 
#> [[8]]$capital
#> [1] "Roseau"
#> 
#> 
#> [[9]]
#> [[9]][[1]]
#> [1] "Europe/Zagreb"
#> 
#> [[9]]$code
#> [1] "HR"
#> 
#> [[9]]$continent
#> [1] "Europe"
#> 
#> [[9]]$name
#> [1] "Croatia"
#> 
#> [[9]]$capital
#> [1] "Zagreb"
#> 
#> 
#> [[10]]
#> [[10]][[1]]
#> [1] "Asia/Dhaka"
#> 
#> [[10]]$code
#> [1] "BD"
#> 
#> [[10]]$continent
#> [1] "Asia"
#> 
#> [[10]]$name
#> [1] "Bangladesh"
#> 
#> [[10]]$capital
#> [1] "Dhaka"
#> 
#> 

ch_unix_time()
#> [1] 704389725
ch_unix_time(20)
#>  [1]  869861411  447819881 1035229798 1201928859  764983347  208369620
#>  [7] 1071599217 1216350851   61696486  979907405 1239025372  312811362
#> [13]  448564162 1700929585  722208264  849164259  496941664 1375552210
#> [19]  680929175  423942516

ch_date_time()
#> [1] "2000-06-27 15:39:16 UTC"
ch_date_time(20)
#> [[1]]
#> [1] "2021-11-17 15:19:12 UTC"
#> 
#> [[2]]
#> [1] "2008-10-24 16:47:13 UTC"
#> 
#> [[3]]
#> [1] "2009-02-16 12:54:37 UTC"
#> 
#> [[4]]
#> [1] "2002-02-25 09:11:14 UTC"
#> 
#> [[5]]
#> [1] "2009-07-28 06:59:27 UTC"
#> 
#> [[6]]
#> [1] "2021-11-14 18:34:42 UTC"
#> 
#> [[7]]
#> [1] "1982-09-05 10:13:17 UTC"
#> 
#> [[8]]
#> [1] "2020-10-18 23:43:07 UTC"
#> 
#> [[9]]
#> [1] "2018-03-04 19:09:17 UTC"
#> 
#> [[10]]
#> [1] "1983-06-07 18:02:36 UTC"
#> 
#> [[11]]
#> [1] "1994-07-15 21:50:32 UTC"
#> 
#> [[12]]
#> [1] "1979-07-16 06:07:37 UTC"
#> 
#> [[13]]
#> [1] "2016-10-14 14:22:36 UTC"
#> 
#> [[14]]
#> [1] "1976-09-11 19:21:14 UTC"
#> 
#> [[15]]
#> [1] "1971-04-23 14:32:43 UTC"
#> 
#> [[16]]
#> [1] "1993-07-20 17:02:20 UTC"
#> 
#> [[17]]
#> [1] "2007-11-23 06:48:59 UTC"
#> 
#> [[18]]
#> [1] "1989-06-26 11:46:20 UTC"
#> 
#> [[19]]
#> [1] "1988-10-03 03:04:04 UTC"
#> 
#> [[20]]
#> [1] "1978-05-24 07:56:28 UTC"
#>
